name: radio-group
description: RadioGroup context provider — wraps Radio components to provide exclusive selection state.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Callback invoked with the new value when a Radio child is selected

props.name: children
props.description: Radio components to render inside the group

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables all Radio children in the group

props.name: containerStyle
props.description: Additional style applied to the group container
